generation.mode: OpenAI built-in image generation plus local chroma-key removal
generation.notes: AI model sheets are approved concept sources. Runtime strips are nearest-neighbor crops generated by tool/build_fish_sprite_strips.py.
prompts: Portrait pixel-art model sheet with exactly four species rows: turquoise starter, golden small fish, coral puffer, indigo hunter; four separated right-facing swim frames per row; flat #FF00FF chroma background; authentic hand-placed 16-bit pixel art; no text or UI.
Coral-pink round puffer swim strip with exactly four separated right-facing frames on flat #00FF00 chroma; authentic 16-bit pixel art; no text, UI, or scenery.

Square edge-to-edge deep ocean water texture for seamless repetition; authentic low-detail 16-bit pixel art; dark navy and teal palette; sparse suspended particles; no objects, fish, UI, border, vignette, or checkerboard.

Exactly eight isolated underwater decoration sprites in a 4x2 grid: two seaweed clumps, two rock clusters, coral, shells, seagrass, and a stone fragment; crisp 16-bit pixel art on uniform #FF00FF chroma; no fish, text, UI, shadows, or watermark.
